subject: Fermi GBM trigger 120602.539 is not a GRB
body:
David Gruber (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 360334602 (120602539)
at 12:56:40.41 UT on 02 June 2012, tentatively classified as a GRB, is
in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particle activity."
